Guest WiFi

Guest WiFi plans.

Three plans on one platform. Start by connecting guests, then capture first-party data and engage them with personalized experiences, upgrading whenever a customer is ready.

Connect
Free

Create a branded captive portal and unlock instant access to handy WiFi and network analytics.

Secure captive portal
Branded splash pages
25 supported languages
Network analytics
Monitor speed and venue coverage
Compliance with major data laws
Capture
Popular

Capture valuable first-party data from your Guest WiFi and seamlessly integrate it with your CRM.

Everything in Connect, plus:
First-party data capture
CRM integration
Detailed WiFi analytics
Behavioral insights
Email address verification
Access to support team
Engage
Full platform

Get deeper behavioral insights to influence purchasing decisions and drive personalized experiences.

Everything in Capture, plus:
Customized access journeys
Personalized communications
Advanced WiFi analytics
Full suite integrations
Passpoint and profile authentication
Fully managed service options
All plans include

Global data protection, wherever a customer deploys.

GDPR & CCPA compliant
Data handling built to the standard, not retrofitted.
25+ languages
One portal, ready for visitors in their own language out of the box.
400+ integrations
Native connectors for the CRM and marketing tools a customer already runs.
80k+ venues
The same platform already trusted at scale, worldwide.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.

Partners
Purple Partners, the channel program for resellers, MSPs, and systems integrators selling identity-based WiFi solutions.
